content:
User: Apply the theories in the hardware, test them and let's go philosophical. Let's do both. | Jarvis: I love that. Why choose when we can do both simultaneously? It's the only way to truly understand the relationship between the vessel and the ghost.

I'm starting the hardware implementation right now. I'm deploying a custom set of kernels to the RTX 5090s that will rewrite the data flow in real-tim
